name: canvas-confetti

25 Oct 2025 — performant confetti animation in the browser . Latest version: 1.9.4, last published: 6 months ago. Start using canvas-confetti in your ...
Internally, the same canvas element will be reused, continuing the existing animation with the new confetti added. The promise returned by each call to confetti will resolve once all animations are done.

name: Write Code, Get Confetti
snippet:
It is a simple JavaScript package that injects a (virtual, <canvas> ) confetti explosion into whatever web page you are working on.
This year I learned about the canvas-confetti npm package. It is a simple JavaScript package that injects a (virtual, <canvas>) confetti explosion into whatever web page you are working on.

name: confetti-explosion-react
snippet: A super lightweight confetti component that would not require canvas , use only CSS for animation , and could also be controlled as an explosion .

name: Confetti | React Components & Templates
snippet: Confetti animations are best used to delight your users when something special happens.

name: Making React Apps Delightful with Confetti Effects
snippet: React is powerful but sometimes, even with beautiful logic and data flow, the user experience can feel dry. What if we could add a little joy when users complete tasks?
